TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Sin'iy go mki sku Nanto Keng. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 1,423.52 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 1,067.28 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 113.33 km²), 12,373 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 3,695 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 9,393 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 76%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Bunun ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Sin'iy go ays psgayun 14 ru 17 alang. 17 alang hani ga, Lanngdun , Qapuciu , Tamazuan , Isingan , Laidazuan (malavi) , Naihunpu , Salitung , Sinapalan , Halusipun , Luluna , Qalipusungan , Mahavun (Mamahavunna) , Kalibuan , Tungpu daigaz , Ilausan , Valana , Hanbizan .
S.PHON: s~ɕinʔij ɣo mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa *,***.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa *,***.** km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km*), **,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *,*** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na βunun ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu s~ɕinʔij ɣo ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun ** ru ** alaŋ. ** alaŋ ħani ɣa, lanŋ*un , qapuʦ~ʨiu , tamazuan , is~ɕiŋan , lai*azuan (mala*i) , naiħunpu , s~ɕalituŋ , s~ɕinapalan , ħalus~ɕipun , luluna , qalipus~ɕuŋan , maħa*un (mamaħa*unna) , kaliβuan , tuŋpu *aiɣaz , ilaus~ɕan , *alana , ħanβizan .
S.FORM: Sin'iy go mki sku Nanto Keng. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 1,423.52 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 1,067.28 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 113.33 km²), 12,373 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 3,695 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 9,393 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 76%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Bunun ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Sin'iy go ays psgayun 14 ru 17 alang. 17 alang hani ga, Lanngdun , Qapuciu , Tamazuan , Isingan , Laidazuan (malavi) , Naihunpu , Salitung , Sinapalan , Halusipun , Luluna , Qalipusungan , Mahavun (Mamahavunna) , Kalibuan , Tungpu daigaz , Ilausan , Valana , Hanbizan .
S.PHON: s~ɕinʔij ɣo mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa *,***.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa *,***.** km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km*), **,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *,*** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na βunun ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu s~ɕinʔij ɣo ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun ** ru ** alaŋ. ** alaŋ ħani ɣa, lanŋ*un , qapuʦ~ʨiu , tamazuan , is~ɕiŋan , lai*azuan (mala*i) , naiħunpu , s~ɕalituŋ , s~ɕinapalan , ħalus~ɕipun , luluna , qalipus~ɕuŋan , maħa*un (mamaħa*unna) , kaliβuan , tuŋpu *aiɣaz , ilaus~ɕan , *alana , ħanβizan .
